title: Lab: Build a Heat-Advisory Update Card
summary: Lab: Build a Heat-Advisory Update Card retrieves prior skills in an original responsive advisory card visual-boundary incident scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css box model, css link states, css backgrounds borders in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real responsive advisory card visual-boundary incident artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

options.text: Responsive advisory card visual-boundary incident case 5: a background image communicates essential content as reliably as an img element.
